assertions.assertion: The login page checks context.IdP from GetAuthorizationContextAsync and bypasses the login UI when an IdP hint is present
assertions.rationale: OnGet checks context.IdP and if set, calls ChallengeExternalProvider bypassing the login UI.

assertions.assertion: The login page performs email-domain-based routing, sending @contoso.com users to the AAD provider
assertions.rationale: OnPost checks Email.EndsWith("@contoso.com") and calls ChallengeExternalProvider("AAD", ReturnUrl).

assertions.assertion: The spa.app client is configured with IdentityProviderRestrictions that includes 'Google' and excludes 'AAD'
assertions.rationale: spa.app has IdentityProviderRestrictions = { "Google", "local" } — includes Google, excludes AAD.

assertions.assertion: The login page issues a Challenge to the appropriate external provider scheme when HRD determines the provider
assertions.rationale: ChallengeExternalProvider calls Challenge(props, provider) with the determined provider scheme.
